reviews.comment:
La cafetería muy buena, El lavadero genial trabajan con máquinas de lavado y a mano, Muy bueno. El taller los repuestos un poco caros pero tanto la atención de los mecanicos y del personal administrativo. Excelente.

(Translated by Google)
The cafeteria is very good. The laundry room is great, they work with washing machines and hand washing. Very good. The workshop and spare parts are a bit expensive, but the service from the mechanics and administrative staff is excellent.
